## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI/Policy

## Validation

- [ ] I tested the integration locally
- [ ] I reviewed Home Assistant logs for errors
- [ ] I updated README if behavior changed

## Risk assessment

- [ ] This PR does not include secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] This PR does not weaken branch protections
- [ ] This PR is safe for main branch merge

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows: `<type>: <short description>` (example: `fix: handle hidraw fallback`)
- [ ] No direct push to `main`
- [ ] At least one reviewer requested
